violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Counter by coffee machines and cabinet interior belowe ice bin noted not in good repair.

REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. Lids open | REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): The outdoor storage area for garbage must be cleaned to prevent insect and rodent harborage. Bags of garbage and other items noted laying on the ground behind the bins.
COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold bar cooler in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41?F was not functioning adequately. Temperatures found and 50?F and greater.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Counter by coffee machines noted not in good repair.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Back of computer monitor and stand and display case for pastry by sliding doors noted not clean
